_source: OLS trend prediction interval for a future observation: yhat +/- t_{(1+conf)/2, n-2} * s * sqrt(1 + 1/n + (x0-xbar)^2/Sxx) (Weisberg, Applied Linear Regression 4th ed. 2014, sec 2.5). Series data=[1,3,2,5,4], n=5, conf=0.95: slope=0.8, intercept=1.4, s=sqrt(1.2)=1.0954451..., xbar=2, Sxx=10, t_{0.975,3}=3.18244630528. Expected [yhat,lower,upper] computed independently at 40-digit precision (mpmath).

cases.description: h=0 forecast at last sample x0=4
h=5 five periods ahead x0=9, band wide enough to admit lower<0
